text.title: AI-Generated Test Audit Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping PR shape + AI signal to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Every leaf is a conclusion ref bound to a rule id.

conclusion.verdict: walk all 12 items; flag missing failure cases

example.trace: test_changes=true → ai_minor=false → all_structural=false → r2-failure-cases-present → walk 12 items

text.example: Canonical traversal from root question through branches to a single conclusion.
